export.title: Export my data
export.description1: Under Article 20 of the GDPR (right to data portability), you can download a full copy of all your personal data in a structured JSON file.
export.description2: The archive contains: your profile, your hosted rooms, your participations, your follow graph, your direct messages, your room messages, your RSVPs, your device list (platform and dates, without the secret token) and your notification preferences.
export.note: Note: the audit log (moderation actions) and reports issued against your account are not included, in accordance with Article 23 of the GDPR (legitimate interest of moderation).
export.success: ✓ Export generated ({{size}} KB) — share it via the share menu.
export.warning: The clipboard is readable by other apps. Only copy the archive if necessary, then clear the clipboard.

delete.title: Delete my account
delete.description: Deleting your account is permanent and irreversible. We will immediately delete your profile, messages, houses, and rooms.
delete.grace: A 30-day grace period is enforced on our backup servers before your data is completely purged.
delete.alertBody: Your account has been deleted. We're sorry to see you go.
delete.stepExport: • You can export your data from Settings → Privacy → Export my data.
delete.stepRooms: • Rooms you hosted will be closed if they are active.
delete.stepMessages: • Direct messages you sent to other users will remain visible to the recipient (cannot be retracted after sending).

s1.title: 1. What data we collect
s1.p1: • Account data: phone number, username, profile picture, bio, social links (optional).
s1.p2: • Content: hosted rooms, participations, direct messages, room messages, reactions, hand raises.
s1.p3: • Metadata: creation date, last login, followers list, interests, platform role.
s1.p4: • Geolocation (optional, after consent): used only for the map feature. Stored at the lowest compatible precision.
s1.p5: • Technical data: IP address, user agent, device tokens for push notifications.

s2.title: 2. Why we collect them
s2.p1: • Provide the service: create an account, join rooms, exchange messages.
s2.p2: • Moderation: reports, suspensions and bans (legitimate interest — community safety).
s2.p3: • Notifications: inform about invitations, starting rooms, received messages (you can disable them in settings).
s2.p4: • Anonymous statistics (optional): crash reports, telemetry. Disabled by default.

s3.title: 3. Who we share them with
s3.p2: • Technical subcontractors only, under GDPR compliant contract: hosting (server), sending authentication SMS, push notifications.
s3.p3: • In case of legal obligation, judicial requisition or protection of a person in danger.

s4.title: 4. How long
s4.p1: • Profile and content: as long as your account is active.
s4.p2: • Account deletion: 30 days grace period, then definitive purge.
s4.p4: • Moderation log (reports, suspensions): kept for 1 year for compliance.

s5.title: 5. Your rights (GDPR)
s5.p1: • Access and portability: export all your data via Settings → Privacy → Export my data.
s5.p2: • Rectification: modify your profile at any time.
s5.p3: • Erasure: delete your account (Settings → Privacy → Delete my account).
s5.p4: • Opposition: disable notifications, location sharing, or crash reporting from settings.
s5.p5: • Complaint: you can seize the competent supervisory authority (CNIL in France).

s6.title: 6. Security
s6.p1: • Passwords and OTP codes stored in hashed form (bcrypt).
s6.p2: • Authentication tokens stored in the secure keychain of the phone.
s6.p3: • All network exchanges are encrypted in HTTPS/TLS. Audio streams are encrypted in DTLS-SRTP.

s7.title: 7. Contact
s7.p1: For any questions regarding your data:

s1.title: 1. Acceptance
s1.p1: By creating an account or using the Chathouse app, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

s2.title: 2. Eligibility
s2.p1: You must be at least 16 years old to use Chathouse. Under this age, explicit consent from a legal guardian is required.
s2.p2: • Do not share illegal, explicit, or copyright-infringing content.
s2.p3: • Do not record rooms without the consent of all speakers.

s3.title: 3. Prohibited Conduct
s3.p1: • Harassment, discrimination, hate speech, non-consensual explicit content.
s3.p2: • Identity theft, fake accounts, unauthorized automation (bots).
s3.p3: • Broadcast of copyrighted works without rights, illegal content.
s3.p4: • Spam, phishing, social engineering, vulnerability exploitation.
s3.p5: • Recording a room without explicit consent from all participants.

s4.title: 4. Moderation
s4.p1: We reserve the right to suspend or delete any violating account, without notice. All moderation actions are logged and auditable.
s4.p2: You can report a user or a room directly in the interface.

s5.title: 5. User Content
s5.p1: You retain full rights to the content you publish. You grant us a non-exclusive license for storage and broadcast strictly necessary for service operation.
s5.p2: Account termination ends this license (except content already received by others via direct messages).

s6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
s6.p1: The service is provided 'as is'. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, nor that all user-published content is lawful.

s7.title: 7. Modifications
s7.p1: These terms may evolve. Material changes will be notified in-app at least 30 days before taking effect.

s8.title: 8. Governing Law
s8.p1: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute falls under the jurisdiction of French courts.
